commits: 98101bbb: fix: enable vertical scrolling on mobile file list (#548) (#554)
message: TDD implementation verified. The fix (commit 98101bbb) changed mobile main container className from 'flex-1 pb-32 overflow-hidden' to 'flex-1 overflow-y-auto'. All 4 dedicated tests pass: overflow-y-auto present, overflow-hidden absent, pb-32 dead code removed, flex-1 retained. ESLint and TypeScript checks clean.
